name: Appointments: Reschedule

description.en: Reschedule an existing booked appointment to a new confirmed slot.
description.de: Verschiebt einen bestehenden gebuchten Termin auf einen neuen bestaetigten Slot.

bot: Use this only after the user has chosen a new specific slot for an existing appointment. Collect the booked meeting id plus the exact new start and end times. If the new slot is rejected, offer fresh availability.

inputs.name: Meeting ID
inputs.bot: The booked meeting id returned by appointment-book.

inputs.name: Scheduled At

description.en: New exact appointment start in ISO format

inputs.bot: Exact confirmed appointment start in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: End At

description.en: New exact appointment end in ISO format

inputs.bot: Exact confirmed appointment end in ISO 8601 format.

inputs.name: Timezone
inputs.bot: Timezone identifier like Europe/Vienna, America/New_York, or UTC.
